metadata.command:
# Check OS distribution and version
cat /etc/os-release

# Check currently listening ports (identifying attack surface)
sudo ss -tulpn

# Check for failed SSH login attempts in the last 24 hours
sudo grep "Failed password" /var/log/auth.log | tail -n 10 || sudo journalctl _SYSTEMD_UNIT=ssh.service | grep "Failed" | tail -n 10
